description: Create the main INSTRUMENT_SOUND_REFERENCE.md reference document (400-500 lines) organized by genre family with full/compressed/minimum descriptors including character counts, inline tag examples, Tier 3 labeling, character budget guidance, three-tier compression system, and 21machines credit.
steps: Add header with Tier 3 label, design principle ('Suno responds to SOUND DESCRIPTIONS, not equipment names'), character budget guidance section, three-tier compression system explanation, and credit to 21machines' acid house experiment

Add Electronic/Dance section: TB-303, TR-909, TR-808, Korg M1, Juno-106, DX7, Minimoog, Prophet-5, Arp, Oberheim, vocoder, Fairlight. Each with: gear name, full descriptor (with char count), compressed descriptor (with char count), minimum viable descriptor (with char count), inline tag example
Add Rock/Blues/Country section: Telecaster, Stratocaster, Les Paul, SG, Marshall amp, Fender amp, Vox AC30, slide guitar, pedal steel, Hammond B3, Wurlitzer, Rhodes, Dobro. Same format.

Add Orchestral/Cinematic section: solo violin, violin section, solo cello, cello section, double bass, French horn, trumpet, trombone, oboe, clarinet, flute, timpani, harp, pipe organ, harpsichord. Same format.
Add Folk/World/Celtic section: tin whistle, uilleann pipes, Highland bagpipes, bodhran, Irish fiddle, concertina, mandolin, banjo, sitar, tabla, djembe, taiko, koto, didgeridoo. Same format.
Add Synthesizer Specific Sounds section: supersaw, Moog bass, Juno pad, DX7 bass, Reese bass, amen break. Same format.
Add Piano Variations section: concert grand, upright, honky-tonk, prepared, toy piano, celesta. Same format.
Add Drums/Percussion Acoustic section: jazz kit brushes, rock kit studio, rock kit live room, Motown kit, Bonham-style, cajon. Same format.
Add footer with cross-references to SUNO_STYLE_GENRE_REFERENCE.md and experiment framework, and note about promotion criteria (needs per-genre testing)
acceptance_criteria: Every instrument entry has full descriptor with char count, compressed descriptor with char count, minimum descriptor with char count, and inline tag example
verification: Grep for 'chars' or 'char' to confirm character counts present
findings: File generated at exactly 500 lines using definition-list format (not table format shown in example) to fit within line budget while including all 71 instruments from all 7 genre families. All 216 character counts verified programmatically. Validator still runs successfully on existing songs.
